channel.title: Tech Reviews on TechWave Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Tech Reviews on TechWave Hub

item.title: Best Laptops Under $500 in 2026
item.description: Looking for the best laptops under $500 in 2026? We've tested and reviewed the top budget laptops that offer the best value for money.

item.title: YouTube: The Company, the Founders, and the Story Behind the World's Biggest Video Platform
item.description: Who owns YouTube? Learn everything about YouTube, its founders Chad Hurley, Steve Chen, and Jawed Karim, and how it became the world's biggest video platform.
